discordant_note.name: Discordant Note
discordant_note.description: Setup/Builder: A jarring sound that irritates the foe. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Rhythm Pip.

fascinate.name: Fascinate
fascinate.description: Setup: A hypnotic melody. Applies [Stalled] and generates 1 Rhythm Pip.

crescendo.name: Crescendo
crescendo.description: Payoff: A massive surge of orchestral power. Consumes 5 Rhythm Pips to deal heavy Magic damage to all enemies.

soul_requiem.name: Soul Requiem
soul_requiem.description: Payoff: A mournful song that drains life. Consumes 3 Rhythm Pips to deal damage and restore Mana to the caster.

serenade_of_safety.name: Serenade of Safety
serenade_of_safety.description: Defense: A soothing song that protects allies. Grants [Shielded] and [Reflective] for 4 ticks.

allegro_step.name: Allegro Step
allegro_step.description: Defense/Mobility: Dance out of the way of an attack. Grants [Evasive] for 2 ticks.

hymn_of_regeneration.name: Hymn of Regeneration
hymn_of_regeneration.description: Mobility/Utility: Move through obstacles and grant allies Health Regeneration for 10 ticks.

echoing_verse.name: Echoing Verse
echoing_verse.description: Utility: Repeat the last non-signature blessing used at 50% power.

bard_physiology.name: Bard Physiology
bard_physiology.description: Passive: Harmonic Flow. Your Rhythm generation is increased by 20% and you gain 5% Mana every tick.
